entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The agrifood sector, identified as one of the most weather-exposed sectors and a priority for many countries

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The environmental phenomenon inducing losses and damages, particularly impacting the agriculture sector

entities.name: LOSS AND DAMAGE
entities.description: The negative impacts and costs resulting from climate change, explicitly mentioned in climate action plans

entities.name: CLIMATE ACTION PLANS
entities.description: Strategic frameworks that address climate change, with about one-third referring to loss and damage

entities.name: LOSS AND DAMAGE FUND
entities.description: A proposed financial mechanism to provide grant-based, additional finance to agriculture and smallholders

entities.name: SMALLHOLDERS
entities.description: Vulnerable farmers who depend on the agriculture sector for their livelihoods

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The condition of having reliable access to sufficient food, which the Loss and Damage fund aims to protect

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of supporting life for vulnerable people and smallholders, threatened by climate change
